description:
You are processing a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for a body camera video. The raw footage is at /home/ga/Videos/bodycam_incident_2024.mp4. The legal department has provided a redaction schedule at /home/ga/Documents/redaction_schedule.txt detailing specific audio mutes and video segment excisions required before public release to protect witness and informant identities, as well as a minor.

Produce the following deliverables in /home/ga/Videos/foia_release/:
1. evidence_audio_redacted.mp4: A copy of the full video with audio muted during the specified audio-mute ranges (0:40-1:00 and 1:20-1:40).
